emmc.title: Connect Board to PC
emmc.text: Connect the board OTG port to your PC via USB-Type C cable.

emmc.title: Enter Maskrom Mode
emmc.text: Press and hold the Maskrom button on the board, then connect the 5V/3A power supply. Release the Maskrom button after the PC detects the device.

emmc.title: Flash Complete
emmc.text: The system will automatically restart and enter the system.
